_publications._publicationTitle: Use of machine learning to predict cognitive performance based on brain metabolism in Neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Small differences between NF1 patients and the control group were noticed in...automatic (FDT-Decoding) and controlled (FDT-Inhibiting) attention processes
details: Showed small differences between groups for both decoding (26.81 ± 7.09 vs 25.44 ± 8.73, d=-0.18) and inhibiting (52.19 ± 14.53 vs 53.19 ± 23.93, d=0.00) conditions
